title: Market Overview
description: Global and European index performance (% change of the daily close, rebased to the start of the selected range), Bitcoin daily close and rainbow chart, and FX rates.

panels.title: Global indexes — % gain/loss (daily close)
panels.description: One benchmark per continent (plus an emerging-markets aggregate) to keep cross-correlations low. Each series is the % change of the daily close, rebased to 0% at the first close inside the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.date::timestamptz AS "time", i.name AS metric, 100.0 * (p.close::float8 / first_value(p.close::float8) OVER (PARTITION BY p.instrument_id ORDER BY p.date) - 1) AS value FROM prices p JOIN instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id WHERE i.kind = 'index' AND i.symbol IN ('SPX', 'STOXX600', 'N225', 'ASX200', 'BOVESPA', 'EEM') AND $__timeFilter(p.date) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: European indexes — % gain/loss (daily close)
panels.description: Main index of each European market, as the % change of the daily close rebased to 0% at the first close inside the selected time range. Indexes whose exchange Yahoo Finance does not cover (SASX-10, SOFIX, CROBEX, FTSE/CySE 20, MSE, MNSE10, MBI10, BET, BELEX15, SAX, SBITOP, PFTS) have no data yet and show no series.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.date::timestamptz AS "time", i.symbol AS metric, 100.0 * (p.close::float8 / first_value(p.close::float8) OVER (PARTITION BY p.instrument_id ORDER BY p.date) - 1) AS value FROM prices p JOIN instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id WHERE i.kind = 'index' AND i.symbol IN ('ATX', 'BEL20', 'SASX10', 'SOFIX', 'CROBEX', 'CYSE20', 'PX', 'OMXC25', 'OMXTGI', 'OMXH25', 'CAC40', 'DAX', 'ATHEX', 'BUX', 'OMXI15', 'ISEQ', 'FTSEMIB', 'OMXRGI', 'OMXVGI', 'LUXX', 'MSE', 'MNSE10', 'AEX', 'MBI10', 'OSEBX', 'WIG20', 'PSI', 'BET', 'BELEX15', 'SAX', 'SBITOP', 'IBEX35', 'OMXS30', 'SMI', 'PFTS', 'FTSE100') AND $__timeFilter(p.date) ORDER BY 1

SELECT p.date::timestamptz AS "time", 'BTC/USD' AS metric, p.close::float8 AS value FROM prices p JOIN instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = 'BTC' AND $__timeFilter(p.date) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: BTC rainbow chart
panels.description: Bitcoin daily close (black line, log scale) inside the rainbow valuation bands from blockchaincenter.net's Bitcoin Rainbow Chart. The center line is a logarithmic regression ln(price) ~ ln(days since genesis) refitted from the full stored history on every refresh (so the bands self-calibrate as data grows, like the chart's V2 recalibration); the nine bands are equal-width steps of 0.3 in log space, colored and labeled exactly as on the website.

targets.rawSql: WITH btc AS (SELECT p.date, p.close::float8 AS close, (p.date - DATE '2009-01-03')::float8 AS days FROM prices p JOIN instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = 'BTC' AND p.close > 0), fit AS (SELECT regr_slope(ln(close), ln(days)) AS a, regr_intercept(ln(close), ln(days)) AS b FROM btc) SELECT b.date::timestamptz AS "time", exp(f.a * ln(b.days) + f.b - 0.75) AS "floor", exp(f.a * ln(b.days) + f.b - 0.45) AS "Basically a Fire Sale", exp(f.a * ln(b.days) + f.b - 0.15) AS "BUY!", exp(f.a * ln(b.days) + f.b + 0.15) AS "Accumulate", exp(f.a * ln(b.days) + f.b + 0.45) AS "Still cheap", exp(f.a * ln(b.days) + f.b + 0.75) AS "HODL!", exp(f.a * ln(b.days) + f.b + 1.05) AS "Is this a bubble?", exp(f.a * ln(b.days) + f.b + 1.35) AS "FOMO intensifies", exp(f.a * ln(b.days) + f.b + 1.65) AS "Sell. Seriously, SELL!", exp(f.a * ln(b.days) + f.b + 1.95) AS "Maximum bubble territory", b.close AS "BTC/USD" FROM btc b CROSS JOIN fit f WHERE $__timeFilter(b.date) ORDER BY 1

SELECT p.date::timestamptz AS "time", i.symbol AS metric, p.close::float8 AS value FROM prices p JOIN instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id WHERE i.kind = 'forex' AND $__timeFilter(p.date) ORDER BY 1
